title: Poem
description:
Persisted poem record. Derived from database/Poems.json. The body is stored as an HTML fragment using
line breaks (source format) and is treated as a special field (see notes in the README).

id.description: Stable unique identifier. UUID v4. Immutable.

body.description:
Poem body as an HTML fragment with
line breaks and literal whitespace for indentation. Editable. Searchable via a normalised plain-text projection, not the raw HTML.

copyright.description:
Free-form copyright / provenance / commentary block as authored. May contain
breaks and embedded URLs.

contests.description: Zero or more contest entries the poem was submitted to.

date.description: Publication / authorship timestamp, ISO 8601 with timezone (UTC in existing data).

project.description: One-sentence authorial statement of the poem's project.

contest_fit.description: Tags used for matching the poem to contests. Searchable.

lines.description: Derived: line count of the rendered body. Stored for convenience; authoritative value is recomputable from body.

words.description: Derived: word count of the rendered body. Stored for convenience; authoritative value is recomputable from body.

pinned.description: Optional. Whether the poem is pinned in listings. Defaults to false when absent.

authors_notes.description: Optional. Author-facing notes. Defaults to [] when absent.

notes.description: Optional. Editorial / public-facing notes. Defaults to [] when absent.

award.description: Award tier. Observed values: Gold. Kept open-vocabulary for flexibility.
